## What

Brief description of the change.

## Why

Problem being solved, context, or motivation.

## Checklist

- [ ] `cargo clippy` — no new warnings
- [ ] `cargo fmt` — formatting applied
- [ ] `cargo test` — tests pass
- [ ] Tests added/updated for new logic (if applicable)
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] Docs updated in `docs/` if behavior changed (CLI, flags, output, config)
- [ ] ADR considered if this is a significant architectural decision
